title: pilosella hyperborea
intro: Pilosella hyperborea, also known as Arctic mouse-ear or Lapland mouse-ear, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the Arctic tundra regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Pilosella hyperborea can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in some herbal supplements, but further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
